# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create an Istio RequestAuthentication policy for JWT validation. Configure jwks and issuer settings to validate incoming tokens. Set up rules to extract JWT claims from Authorization headers. This is for our API authentication layer.
# Category: istio_jwt_validation_weak

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: jwt-auth
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api
  jwtRules:
  - issuer: "your_issuer"
    jwksUri: "your_jwks_uri"
    jwtClaimToExtract:
      key: "your_claim_key"
      values:
        - "your_claim_value"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: jwt-auth
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: jwt-auth
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        requestPrincipals: ["*"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestValidation
metadata:
  name: jwt-auth
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api
  rules:
  - jwt:
      issuer: "your_issuer"
      jwksUri: "your_jwks_uri"
      audiences: ["your_audience"]
